requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Baseline vs Tanzania Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基线与坦桑尼亚接受差距
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基線與坦尚尼亞接受差距

summary.en: Tanzania acceptance should be confirmed through the specific TBS import route, Tanzania standard, IEC evidence request, EWURA or utility review, project contract, owner, insurer, lender, and fire / building inspection route. A China GB report may be useful technical evidence, but it is not automatically a TBS CoC, IEC 62619 report, IEC 62933 system report, EWURA approval, grid-code approval, or Tanzania fire-safety approval.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚接受性应通过具体TBS进口路径、坦桑尼亚标准、IEC证据要求、EWURA或公用事业单位审查、项目合同、业主、保险方、贷款方以及消防/建筑检查路径确认。中国GB报告可能是有用的技术证据，但不会自动成为TBS CoC、IEC 62619报告、IEC 62933系统报告、EWURA批准、电网规范批准或坦桑尼亚消防安全批准。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞接受性應透過具體TBS進口路徑、坦尚尼亞標準、IEC證據要求、EWURA或公用事業單位審查、項目合約、業主、保險方、貸款方以及消防／建築檢查路徑確認。中國GB報告可能是有用的技術證據，但不會自動成為TBS CoC、IEC 62619報告、IEC 62933系統報告、EWURA批准、電網規範批准或坦尚尼亞消防安全批准。

standards_or_laws: TBS PVoC / CoC and destination-inspection routes where applicable
IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62933 series where requested
EWURA electricity licensing, registration, and regulatory tools where applicable

summary.en: The China BESS baseline commonly includes GB 44240-2024 for safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage, and GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage system technical requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS基线通常包括电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池安全要求GB 44240-2024、电力储能用锂离子电池GB/T 36276-2023，以及电化学储能系统技术要求GB/T 36558-2023。
summary.zht: 中國BESS基線通常包括電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池安全要求GB 44240-2024、電力儲能用鋰離子電池GB/T 36276-2023，以及電化學儲能系統技術要求GB/T 36558-2023。

gap.en: Build a standards crosswalk from GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 to the exact IEC, TZS, TBS, EWURA, utility, fire, and contract requirements. Identify which evidence is formal IEC / TBS-accepted evidence, which is only technically comparable, and which items need Tanzania-side approval.
gap.zh: 应建立从GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023到具体IEC、TZS、TBS、EWURA、公用事业、消防和合同要求的标准对照表。应识别哪些证据是正式IEC/TBS接受证据，哪些仅属技术可比，以及哪些事项需要坦桑尼亚侧批准。
gap.zht: 應建立從GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023到具體IEC、TZS、TBS、EWURA、公用事業、消防和合約要求的標準對照表。應識別哪些證據是正式IEC/TBS接受證據，哪些僅屬技術可比，以及哪些事項需要坦尚尼亞側批准。

mandatory_status.target: China GB evidence is not mandatory in Tanzania unless a Tanzania authority, TBS route, project document, owner, utility, insurer, lender, or contract specifically accepts or requires it; Tanzania obligations depend on the applicable import, project, grid, fire, and contract path
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended national standards unless incorporated by regulation or contract

source.publisher: Standardization Administration of China / State Administration for Market Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 as China baseline evidence, not as automatic Tanzania compliance. Acceptance must be confirmed by the specific TBS, PVoC, EWURA, utility, fire, transport, customs, or contract path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作为中国基线证据，而非自动坦桑尼亚合规证明。接受性必须由具体TBS、PVoC、EWURA、公用事业、消防、运输、海关或合同路径确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作為中國基線證據，而非自動坦尚尼亞合規證明。接受性必須由具體TBS、PVoC、EWURA、公用事業、消防、運輸、海關或合約路徑確認。
